heading: Launch a sharper service page in one focused week
body: A synthetic web-studio offer for operators who already know the service they need to sell.

heading: Strategy, build, and publishing in one loop
body: Position the offer, structure the page, review the preview, then publish to the owner's GitHub Pages target.

heading: What the client needs ready
body: A clear offer, a short proof library, and one accountable reviewer. The pack keeps those materials organized before publish.

heading: Review the preview before anything leaves the machine
body: Generate a local artifact first. Publish only after the exact preview is approved.
